response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics perfectly match the reference song lyrics for 'Sarracenia' and 'G4L'. For 'MAKE IT, BREAK IT', the transcription-based lyrics were used and refined.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for disambiguation of fast-paced vocals and accurate transcription of the group talking portion.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to synchronize with the virtual performers' fast vocal delivery. Transition gaps were kept sharp to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: あれが正解なんて
subtitles.english: Are you sure that was the correct answer?

subtitles.original: 誰の成れの果て？
subtitles.english: Whose end did it come to?

subtitles.original: 答えも欲しいのも一個てこれだけ
subtitles.english: The answer and what I want is only this one

subtitles.original: 悩んだってしょうがないじゃんね
subtitles.english: There's no point in worrying, is there?

subtitles.original: あれは夢だったって思うことにしたって
subtitles.english: Even if I decide to think it was just a dream

subtitles.original: でも全然思えないんだけど
subtitles.english: But I can't think that at all

subtitles.original: 助けてよフォロワー！
subtitles.english: Help me, follower!

subtitles.original: 抗うだけ若さに負け
subtitles.english: Just resisting, losing to youth

subtitles.original: next, next, lucky, lucky & lucky!
subtitles.english: next, next, lucky, lucky & lucky!

subtitles.original: アーリーオ 割り切れたらさ
subtitles.english: Ah-li-o, if you could just get through it

subtitles.original: オーリーオ 楽なのにとか
subtitles.english: O-li-o, it would be easy...

subtitles.original: もうやだ！
subtitles.english: I've had enough!

subtitles.original: なんていう新世界か！
subtitles.english: What kind of new world is this?!

subtitles.original: あなた以外は あなた以外はいらない ない ない
subtitles.english: I don't need anyone but you, anyone but you

subtitles.original: はらないでよバリア あるはずなの何か
subtitles.english: Don't put up a barrier, there must be something

subtitles.original: あったならば happy, jumpin', yeah
subtitles.english: If you find it, happy, jumpin', yeah

subtitles.original: あなたのその手と
subtitles.english: Your hand...

subtitles.original: あたしのこの手を
subtitles.english: ...and my hand

subtitles.original: つないだらもう二度と離さないわ
subtitles.english: If connected, I won't let go ever again

subtitles.original: あなたのその手が
subtitles.english: If your hand...

subtitles.original: あたしのこの手を
subtitles.english: ...grabs my hand

subtitles.original: 掴んだら 以後お見知りおきを my love
subtitles.english: From now on, nice to meet you, my love

subtitles.original: しらけんが来たぞー！
subtitles.english: Shiraken is here!

subtitles.original: 後半戦！レッツゴー！盛り上がっていくぞ！レッツゴー！
subtitles.english: Second half! Let's go! Let's pump it up! Let's go!

subtitles.original: しらけんの充電足りてる？足りてないよねー！後半戦も盛り上がっていくぞー！
subtitles.english: Is your Shiraken charge full? Not enough, right? Let's pump up the second half too!

subtitles.original: みんなのことをもっとメラメラにしちゃうぞ！後半戦もせーの、うー、にゃっぴー！
subtitles.english: I'll make you all even more fired up! For the second half, ready, set, oo-nyappii!

subtitles.original: みんなに出会えて、とっても幸せです！画面の向こうのみんな、声出してー！おらー！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy to meet all of you! Everyone on the other side of the screen, make some noise! Let's go!

subtitles.original: 新しい姿のしらけんで、新しい曲！聴いてくれ、MAKE IT, BREAK IT！
subtitles.english: With Shiraken's new look, a new song! Please listen, MAKE IT, BREAK IT!

subtitles.original: Make it, break it, make it, break it, Make it, break it, look on!
subtitles.english: Make it, break it, make it, break it, Make it, break it, look on!

subtitles.original: パッと目が合えば I know 君こそが相棒
subtitles.english: Once our eyes meet, I know you are my partner

subtitles.original: メロディ奏でる才能は Make it, break it, make it, break it
subtitles.english: Our talent for creating melodies is Make it, break it, make it, break it

subtitles.original: パッと見 丁寧にしてても
subtitles.english: Even if we seem polite at first glance,

subtitles.original: 中身は冷めてても
subtitles.english: even if we are cold inside,

subtitles.original: そのギャップと愛嬌あれば最強
subtitles.english: with that gap and charm, we're the strongest!

subtitles.original: 平凡、お仕事、平穏そう？
subtitles.english: Ordinary? Work? Looking peaceful?

subtitles.original: 一蓮托生は敵わない 退屈に用はない
subtitles.english: Being in the same boat is unbeatable, I have no use for boredom!

subtitles.original: 一線画すよバディライン 届かない しょうがない
subtitles.english: Drawing a line on our buddy line, you can't reach us, too bad!

subtitles.original: 追い風がするどい風に変わっても バディ、バディ！
subtitles.english: Even if the tailwind turns into a sharp wind, buddy, buddy!
